ddls:
CREATE TABLE "data_flows" (
  "data_flow_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data flow */,
  "data_flow_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier of the data flow */,
  "data_flow_version" TEXT /* Version of the data flow */,
  "last_update" TEXT /* Date and time of the last update */,
  "source_system" TEXT /* Source system or provider of the data flow */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the data flow (e.g., active, inactive, archived) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data flow was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data flow was last updated */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the data flow */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "waste_types" (
  "waste_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each type of waste */,
  "waste_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier of the waste type */,
  "waste_description" TEXT /* Description of the waste type */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the waste type */,
  "is_hazardous" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the waste type is hazardous */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the waste type was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the waste type was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("waste_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "units" (
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each unit of measurement */,
  "unit_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier of the unit */,
  "unit_description" TEXT /* Description of the unit */,
  "is_standard" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the unit is a standard unit of measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the unit was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the unit was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographies" (
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographical location */,
  "geo_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier of the geographical location */,
  "geo_description" TEXT /* Description of the geographical location */,
  "country_name" TEXT /* Name of the country */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the geographical location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the geographical location */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state within the country */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the geographical location was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the geographical location was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("geo_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "time_periods" (
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each time period */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the time period */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the time period */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the time period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the time period */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the time period was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the time period was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("time_period_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "frequencies" (
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each frequency */,
  "frequency_code" TEXT /* Code or identifier of the frequency */,
  "frequency_description" TEXT /* Description of the frequency */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the frequency was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the frequency was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("frequency_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observations" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "data_flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data flow the observation belongs to */,
  "waste_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the waste type */,
  "unit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the unit of measurement */,
  "geo_id" INTEGER /* ID of the geographical location */,
  "time_period_id" INTEGER /* ID of the time period */,
  "frequency_id" INTEGER /* ID of the frequency */,
  "obs_value" REAL /* Observed value */,
  "obs_flag" TEXT /* Observation flag (e.g., None, Estimated) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the observation was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the observation was last updated */,
  "source_reference" TEXT /* Reference to the original data source or document */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Methodology used to collect the observation */,
  "quality_flag" TEXT /* Quality flag to indicate the reliability of the observation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_waste_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("waste_type_id") REFERENCES waste_types ("waste_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_frequency_id FOREIGN KEY ("frequency_id") REFERENCES frequencies ("frequency_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_data_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_flow_id") REFERENCES data_flows ("data_flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_geo_id FOREIGN KEY ("geo_id") REFERENCES geographies ("geo_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_time_period_id FOREIGN KEY ("time_period_id") REFERENCES time_periods ("time_period_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observations_unit_id FOREIGN KEY ("unit_id") REFERENCES units ("unit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "source_description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data source was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the data source was last updated */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL of the data source's website */,
  "public" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the data source is publicly accessible */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_flow_sources" (
  "flow_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the link between a data flow and its source */,
  "data_flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data flow */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the link was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the link was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("flow_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_flow_sources_data_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_flow_id") REFERENCES data_flows ("data_flow_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_flow_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the user was last updated */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp for the user's last login */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Boolean to indicate if the user account is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observation being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the observation */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the observation was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_observation_id FOREIGN KEY ("observation_id") REFERENCES observations ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "data_flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data flow the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file (e.g., CSV, JSON, XML) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_data_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_flow_id") REFERENCES data_flows ("data_flow_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "readme_files" (
  "readme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each readme file */,
  "data_flow_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data flow the readme file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the readme file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the readme file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the readme file (e.g., TXT, PDF) */,
  "checksum" TEXT /* Checksum to ensure data integrity */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the file was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the file was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("readme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_readme_files_data_flow_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_flow_id") REFERENCES data_flows ("data_flow_id")
)
